hero.title: Public accessibility projects
hero.lead: This registry lists public projects maintained through IATF. Accepted accessibility projects, site infrastructure, and archived prototypes are kept visible here.

intro: Accepted projects are listed here once they are published.

header.title: Turn a concrete accessibility need into a public project

paragraphs: IATF reviews concrete accessibility needs that can be turned into useful public open source work.

emptyState.title: No projects published yet
paragraphs: IATF is preparing its first public project set.
You can still send a request if you have a concrete accessibility need.
